summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing for Jandia Arena TV Dashboard. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%) and all 4 frontend screens rotate correctly with proper German labels, countdown, live indicators, and demo data. No issues found.

issues: The 'Made with Emergent' overlay (deployment-injected) sits at bottom-right and visually overlaps the 'Vollbild · TV-Modus' button text. Not a code-side bug - the button is still clickable; mention only for awareness in production.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: _build_matches() is called multiple times per request set (each endpoint regenerates). Acceptable for demo (pure CPU work), but could be cached. Non-blocking.
Live minute logic clamps halftime/second-half nicely; matches m3 (37') and m4 (62'→47') verified live during testing.
Frontend correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL; no hardcoded URLs.
All key elements expose data-testid as documented.
Dashboard uses h-screen + overflow-hidden – no vertical scrollbar confirmed (clientHeight==scrollHeight==1080).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None - demo data is generated server-side by _build_matches() relative to current time
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_matches.py (pytest, 11 tests). Demo data is time-anchored: matches m1/m2 always finished, m3/m4 always live, m5-m8 always upcoming today. Frontend rotates screens every 15s in order: today → next → live → final. UI confirmed loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with no console errors. live-badge (green 'Daten · Live') showed since real backend was reachable. To force demo-badge, block /api/matches request. All data-testid selectors documented in the request work correctly.
